title: Stop The Bullying & Harassment Of Members…You Can’t Run NUPENG As Personal Enterprise, PTD Tells Union’s President & Scribe - FinancialEDGE
description: Comrade Joseph Dagogo-Jack, a leader of the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD), branch of the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) in Port Harcourt Zone has accused the President and the General Secretary of NUPENG, Williams Akporeha and Afolabi Olawale of using bullying, harassment and other unconstitutional tactics to run the affairs of
html: Comrade Joseph Dagogo-Jack, a leader of the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD), branch of the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) in Port Harcourt Zone has accused the President and the General Secretary of NUPENG, Williams Akporeha and Afolabi Olawale of using bullying, harassment and other unconstitutional tactics to run the affairs of the union.
